title: Energy transition: UK - Netherlands memorandum of understanding
body: "Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero Ed Miliband and Minister of Climate and Policy and Green Growth and Deputy Prime Minister Sophie Hermans signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to promote and strengthen the collaboration and cooperation between the two countries in the field of energy transition, energy policy and climate.  This ambitious and wide-ranging agreement will deepen and bolster our cooperation across a wide range of energy policy areas, including:   offshore wind electricity interconnection energy security and winter preparedness gas interconnection hydrogen carbon capture, utilisation, and storage (CCUS) civil nuclear including Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) heat networks and decarbonising heat   "
